parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the effect. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the effect.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filters.
parameters-en.Frequency: Controls the range of the filters.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
